overview: Time Reel is a next-generation short video social platform inspired by TikTok. Watch and discover viral short videos with an infinite vertical feed, upload your own content, follow creators, engage with likes and comments, and support creators with virtual gifts. Features a futuristic dark-mode UI with smooth animations and a creator monetization system powered by virtual coins and gifts.
features: Infinite vertical video feed with snap-to-video scroll
Video upload with title, tags, and category
Likes, comments, and shares on videos
Trending discovery page with engagement-velocity scoring
Virtual gift system — send coins to creators
Coin wallet and coin purchase packs
